title: Downrush Falls
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Downrush Falls''' was a huge waterfall on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]], [[Meter/Legends|kilometers]] deep. It was formed when the [[Great Downrush]] went off a cliff at the south end of [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]].

==Appearances==
*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}}
